periods.name: This Afternoon
periods.detailedForecast: Rain showers and patchy fog. Cloudy. High near 54, with temperatures falling to around 45 in the afternoon. Northwest wind 9 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 30 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

periods.name: Tonight
periods.shortForecast: Rain Showers Likely then Partly Cloudy
periods.detailedForecast: Rain showers likely and patchy fog before 8pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 33. Northwest wind 6 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 28 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
